2606.06946.title: Auditing Training Data in Domain-adapted LLMs: LoRA-MINT
2606.06946.paper_summary: We present LoRA-MINT, a new methodology for Membership Inference Test (MINT) applied to recent Large Language Models (LLMs) fine-tuned for specific Natural Language Processing (NLP) tasks through Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). The primary goal is to assess whether individual samples were part of the training data of these adapted models, providing a useful auditing tool for the management of intellectual property and sensitive data. Our analysis explores the relationship between model perplexity and membership status, providing a systematic framework for estimating data exposure in fine-tuned LLMs. We conducted experiments on four models and three benchmark datasets, obtaining precision values in determining if given data were used for training ranging from 0.77 to 0.92, which outperform state-of-the-art baselines and demonstrate the robustness and generality of the proposed method. In general, our findings underscore the potential of LoRA-MINT as an effective and scalable framework for auditing LLMs, improving transparency, and fostering the ethical and responsible deployment of AI and NLP technologies. For the sake of concreteness and current relevance, our discussion and experiments are centered on LoRAadjusted LLMs, but note that most of the presented methodology is easily applicable for auditing training data given any other technique for adapting LLMs or, more generally, any other domain-adapted AI models.
2606.06946.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了 LoRA-MINT，一種針對最近大型語言模型（LLMs）應用於會員推斷測試（MINT）的新方法，這些模型經過低秩適應（LoRA）微調以執行特定的自然語言處理（NLP）任務。<lb/>主要目標是評估個別樣本是否為這些適應模型的訓練數據的一部分，為知識產權和敏感數據的管理提供有用的審計工具。<lb/>我們的分析探討了模型困惑度與會員狀態之間的關係，提供了一個系統框架來估計微調 LLMs 中的數據暴露。<lb/>我們對四個模型和三個基準數據集進行了實驗，獲得了在判斷給定數據是否用於訓練的精確度值，範圍從 0.77 到 0.92，超越了最先進的基準，並展示了所提方法的穩健性和通用性。<lb/>總的來說，我們的研究結果強調了 LoRA-MINT 作為一個有效且可擴展的 LLMs 審計框架的潛力，改善了透明度，並促進了 AI 和 NLP 技術的倫理和負責任的部署。<lb/>為了具體性和當前的相關性，我們的討論和實驗集中在 LoRA 調整的 LLMs 上，但請注意，所呈現的方法論大部分也可以輕鬆應用於審計任何其他適應 LLMs 的技術或更一般地說，任何其他領域適應的 AI 模型的訓練數據。
2606.06946.author: Gonzalo Mancera et.al.
2606.06946.authors: Gonzalo Mancera, Daniel DeAlcala, Aythami Morales, Julian Fierrez, Ruben Tolosana, Francisco Jurado
